channel.title: GNtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tesla drops Musk’s $29B ‘interim’ award after Delaware court restored larger pay package
item.description: The company is following through on its promise to not let Musk "double dip" if he won his appeal to restore Tesla's 2018 compensation package, worth ...

item.title: Best Fitbit Models for Beginners, Athletes, and Kids (2026)
item.description: The fitness trackers I'd recommend to beginners, athletes, and kids.

item.title: Grab a ticket today: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 kicks off in just a week in San Francisco
item.description: StrictlyVC San Francisco is in just a week. Now’s the time to grab yourself a ticket. Join VCs and founders at Sentro Filipino Cultural Center on Apri...

item.title: These New Smart Glasses From Ex-OnePlus Engineers Have a Hidden Cost
item.description: The Kickstarter-funded glasses from L'Atitude 52°N have AI features bundled for 1 year, but the company doesn't know yet how much it will charge for a...

item.title: Best Robot Vacuum of 2026: Shark, Eufy
item.description: Tired of vacuuming? Hand the reins to a robot vacuum.

item.title: Another customer of troubled startup Delve suffered a big security incident
item.description: TechCrunch has confirmed that Delve was the compliance company that performed the security certifications for Context AI, the AI agent training startu...

item.title: Lume Cube Edge Light Go Review (2026): Versatile, Portable
item.description: Portable lamps are rarely, if ever, as powerful, precise, and multipurpose as the Lume Cube Edge Light Go.

item.title: Labor unrest at Samsung may worsen memory chip supply issues
item.description: Tens of thousands of Samsung Electronics workers held a rally at the company’s Pyeongtaek campus in South Korea on Thursday to signal they are prepare...

item.title: The Best Robotic Pool Cleaners of 2026: Beatbot, iGarden, Dreame
item.description: Send the pool guy packing. One of these robotic buddies can maintain your water quality instead.

item.title: WhatsApp adds prepaid phone recharges in India as its payments usage still lags
item.description: WhatsApp is rolling out prepaid phone recharges to its 500 million users in India via PayU.
